middle-third-dynamic.description: Vertical 2-minute reels with a script-synced Remotion middle-third text overlay that animates in and out per phrase.

horizontal-youtube-lowerthird.description: Horizontal 16:9 YouTube reels: Remotion lower-third title (fades after 6s), Ken Burns zoom, full-frame image cut-ins every ~30s, safe-zone captions.
